question: Management canceled my previously approved annual leave without an emergency. Can I grieve this?

analysis.primary_issue: Whether management may cancel previously approved annual leave

legal_issues.issue: Management cancellation of previously approved annual leave
legal_issues.why_it_matters: Must verify whether contract or manual limits cancellation to emergency situations
search_queries: management cancel previously approved annual leave

facts_needed: Whether leave was previously approved in writing

governing_passage.text: Question: Under what circumstances can management cancel previously approved annual leave? Answer: Employees who have annual leave approved are entitled to such annual leave except in emergency situations.

distractor_passage.text: Answer: An employee who is on extended absence may use annual and/or sick leave in conjunction with LWOP prior to exhausting his/her leave balances, subject to approval of the leave in accordance with normal procedures.
